headline: Sentiment down 63% this week, frustrations declining
key_insights: Optimism trending up 48% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 120 quotes and 89 at strong intensity, driving the highest engagement despite falling from yesterday's peak.

• Optimism continues declining to -22.3, now approaching its lowest levels in the 48-day range with relatively few strong voices.

• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's deep negative but remain well below average with moderate engagement.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
